//: SeaweedFS S3 identities — the object-storage tier's well-known LAB credentials (telemetry-cost-controls). Deliberately-insecure loopback lab posture, exactly like the Password1!/masterkey defaults in docker-compose.yaml. In PRODUCTION the stores point the SAME config at a cloud object store (S3/GCS) or a self-hosted SeaweedFS via env (TELEMETRY_S3_*); this file is never used there. One identity with full actions: the only clients are the stores (Tempo blocks, Loki chunks), which create/read/write their own buckets.
